rules.name: SE_Order_Organization_AD_Org_ID
rules.description: Set defaults when organization changes (trigger: AD_Org_ID)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Organization-dependent defaults (warehouse, price list) not auto-set

rules.name: SL_Order_DocType_C_DocTypeTarget_ID
rules.description: Auto-configure order based on document type selection (trigger: C_DocTypeTarget_ID)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Document type sub-settings not applied automatically

rules.name: SL_Order_UpdateLinesDate_DateOrdered
rules.description: Propagate order date changes to order lines (trigger: DateOrdered)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Line dates would not sync with header date changes

rules.name: SL_Order_UpdateLinesDate_DatePromised
rules.description: Propagate promised date changes to order lines (trigger: DatePromised)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Line dates would not sync with header date changes

rules.name: SL_Order_PriceList_M_PriceList_ID
rules.description: Update currency and tax settings from price list (trigger: M_PriceList_ID)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Currency mismatch and wrong tax settings after price list change

rules.name: SE_Order_BPartner_C_BPartner_ID
rules.description: Auto-fill address, contact, price list, payment terms from business partner (trigger: C_BPartner_ID)
rules.impactIfOmitted: User must manually set all partner-related fields

rules.name: SL_Charge_C_Charge_ID
rules.description: Set charge amount and tax when charge selected (trigger: C_Charge_ID)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Charge lines would lack proper tax and amount

rules.name: SE_Order_BPartnerLocation_C_BPartner_Location_ID
rules.description: Update tax zone and delivery info from partner location (trigger: C_BPartner_Location_ID)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Tax calculations may use wrong zone after location change

rules.name: SE_Order_Project_C_Project_ID
rules.description: Auto-fill project-related defaults (trigger: C_Project_ID)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Project defaults not populated; minor for simplified UI

rules.name: SL_Order_Product_M_Product_ID
rules.description: Auto-fill UOM, price, tax, description from product (trigger: M_Product_ID)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Critical: product line fields not populated

rules.name: SL_Order_Amt_QtyOrdered
rules.description: Recalculate line amounts when quantity changes (trigger: QtyOrdered)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Line totals not recalculated after quantity change

rules.name: SL_Order_Amt_PriceList
rules.description: Recalculate line amounts when list price changes (trigger: PriceList)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Line totals not recalculated after price change

rules.name: SL_Order_Amt_PriceActual
rules.description: Recalculate line amounts when actual price changes (trigger: PriceActual)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Line totals not recalculated after price change

rules.name: SL_Order_Amt_C_Tax_ID
rules.description: Recalculate line amounts when tax changes (trigger: C_Tax_ID)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Tax amounts not recalculated

rules.name: SL_Order_Charge_Tax_C_Charge_ID
rules.description: Determine tax for charge lines (trigger: C_Charge_ID)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Charge lines would have wrong or missing tax

rules.name: SL_Order_Tax_C_BPartner_Location_ID
rules.description: Recalculate tax when partner location changes on line (trigger: C_BPartner_Location_ID)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Tax not updated when delivery address changes

rules.name: SL_Order_Amt_LineNetAmt
rules.description: Recalculate prices/discount from line net amount (trigger: LineNetAmt)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Reverse price calculation from net amount not working

rules.name: SL_Order_Amt_Discount
rules.description: Recalculate prices from discount percentage (trigger: Discount)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Discount not applied to unit price

rules.name: SL_Order_Amt_M_AttributeSetInstance_ID
rules.description: Recalculate amounts when attribute set instance changes (trigger: M_AttributeSetInstance_ID)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Attribute-specific pricing not applied

rules.name: SL_Order_Conversion_M_Product_Uom_Id
rules.description: Convert between order UOM and base UOM quantities (trigger: M_Product_Uom_Id)
rules.impactIfOmitted: UOM conversion quantities not synced

rules.name: SL_Order_Conversion_QuantityOrder
rules.description: Convert order UOM quantity to base quantity (trigger: QuantityOrder)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Base quantity not calculated from order UOM entry

rules.name: SL_Order_Amt_CANCELPRICEAD
rules.description: Recalculate amounts after canceling discounts/promotions (trigger: CANCELPRICEAD)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Amounts not recalculated when promotions canceled

rules.name: OperativeQuantity_To_BaseQuantity_C_Aum
rules.description: Convert operative (alternative) UOM quantity to base quantity (trigger: C_Aum)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Base quantity not calculated from alternative UOM entry

rules.name: OperativeQuantity_To_BaseQuantity_Aumqty
rules.description: Convert operative quantity to base quantity (trigger: Aumqty)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Base quantity not calculated from operative qty entry

rules.name: SL_Order_Amt_Gross_Unit_Price
rules.description: Recalculate line amounts from gross unit price (trigger: Gross_Unit_Price)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Gross price amounts not recalculated

rules.name: AD_Org_without_star_AD_Org_ID
rules.description: Exclude the wildcard organization (*) from selector
rules.impactIfOmitted: Users could select the system org (*)

rules.name: C_DocType_PO_SO_C_DocTypeTarget_ID
rules.description: Filter document types by SO/PO transaction type and return/quotation flags
rules.impactIfOmitted: Wrong document types shown in selector

rules.name: AD_User_Org_Tree_SalesRep_ID
rules.description: Org tree security filter for sales rep selector
rules.impactIfOmitted: Backend handles org tree filtering via selectors

rules.name: C_BPartner_Location_Bill_To_BillTo_ID
rules.description: Filter bill-to addresses: only active locations flagged as BillTo for selected partner
rules.impactIfOmitted: All addresses shown, not just valid bill-to ones

rules.name: Invoice_Rules_for_POS_InvoiceRule
rules.description: Restrict invoice rules for POS (Warehouse Receipt) orders
rules.impactIfOmitted: Invalid invoice rules selectable for POS orders

rules.name: Price_List_isSOTrx_M_PriceList_ID
rules.description: Filter price lists by sales/purchase transaction type
rules.impactIfOmitted: Purchase price lists shown on sales orders

rules.name: AD_User_C_BPartner_Contacts_AD_User_ID
rules.description: Filter contacts to those belonging to selected business partner
rules.impactIfOmitted: All contacts shown, not just partner's contacts

rules.name: C_BPartner_Location_Ship_To_C_BPartner_Location_ID
rules.description: Filter ship-to addresses: only active ShipTo locations for selected partner
rules.impactIfOmitted: Non-shipping addresses shown in selector

rules.name: C_Project_status_bpartner_C_Project_ID
rules.description: Filter projects by open/order status and matching business partner
rules.impactIfOmitted: Closed or unrelated projects shown in selector

rules.name: AD_User_C_BPartner_Contacts_Drop_DropShip_User_ID
rules.description: Filter drop-ship contacts to those belonging to drop-ship partner
rules.impactIfOmitted: Wrong contacts shown for drop-ship partner

rules.name: C_BPartner_Location_Drop_Ship_To_DropShip_Location_ID
rules.description: Filter drop-ship locations: ShipTo addresses for drop-ship partner
rules.impactIfOmitted: Non-shipping addresses shown for drop-ship

rules.name: C_BPartner_Location_Ship_To_Delivery_Location_ID
rules.description: Filter delivery locations: only active ShipTo addresses for selected partner
rules.impactIfOmitted: Non-shipping addresses shown in delivery location selector

rules.name: FIN_PaymentMethods_FIN_Paymentmethod_ID
rules.description: Filter payment methods: only those with matching pay-in/pay-out configuration
rules.impactIfOmitted: Invalid payment methods selectable

rules.name: Return_reason_RFC_RTV_C_Return_Reason_ID_header
rules.description: Filter return reasons by RFC (customer return) or RTV (vendor return) based on transaction type
rules.impactIfOmitted: Wrong return reason types shown

rules.name: AD_Org_child_orgs_AD_Org_ID_lines
rules.description: Filter organizations to ready child orgs of parent org on order lines
rules.impactIfOmitted: Lines could select orgs outside parent hierarchy

rules.name: C_Tax_IsSOTrx_Date_C_Tax_ID
rules.description: Filter taxes by validity date, SO/PO type, and tax-undeductable org setting
rules.impactIfOmitted: Expired or wrong-type taxes selectable

rules.name: C_BPartner_Location_Ship_To_C_BPartner_Location_ID_lines
rules.description: Filter ship-to addresses on order lines: only active ShipTo locations for partner
rules.impactIfOmitted: Non-shipping addresses shown in line selector

rules.name: Return_reason_RFC_RTV_C_Return_Reason_ID_lines
rules.description: Filter return reasons on order lines by RFC/RTV based on transaction type
rules.impactIfOmitted: Wrong return reason types shown on lines

rules.name: UOM_Validation_C_Aum
rules.description: Filter alternative UOMs to those defined for the selected product
rules.impactIfOmitted: Invalid UOMs selectable for product

rules.name: AD_Client_Security_AD_Client_ID_header
